title: Just Herbs South Asia Partners is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Just Herbs South Asia Partners is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Just Herbs South Asia Partners! We are hiring a E-commerce Executive for our Chandigarh team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Just Herbs South Asia Partners:
Just Herbs South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Develop and implement category growth strategies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Just Herbs South Asia Partners!
